sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 12:00:00');
SELECT date_part(['year', 'month', 'day'], event_time) FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 12:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_part(['year', 'month', 'day'], event_time) AS date_parts FROM test_timestamps;
